panels.description: Demonstrates port-based edge overrides with both data-driven and manual styling. Uses Record shapes (LoadBalancer, APIGateway) and HTML table PORT attributes (Server, Database) to show port-to-port connections with dynamic color, width, and label overrides based on real-time metrics.
panels.title: Edge Overrides Connecting Node Ports (Record & HTML)
